description: Publish wc-mcp to the npm registry. Pre-requisites: smoke test passed, README approved, tarball audit clean, all CI checks green on main. Steps: verify npm authentication, run pnpm publish --access public, verify npx wc-mcp works for a first-time user with no local install, tag v0.1.0 in git, create GitHub release with CHANGELOG content. Post-publish: submit to awesome-mcp-servers list, post announcement to Lit Discord and Web Components Community Group. This is the finish line for v0.1.0.
title: npm publish v0.1.0
